histrix.title: ingreso de DEMERITOS en la recepcion

table.label: generacion de Demeritos
table.sql: INSERT into MOVDEMERITO ( `prvcod` , `demfec` , `coddem` , `puesto` , `nrocomp` , `movfec` , `artcod`, `cpsmovim_id` ) select [__ctacod__] , '[__movfec__1__]' , DEMERITO.coddem , ([__remnpv__] + 0 ), ([__remnro__] + 0), '[__ocpfec__]' , '[__artcod__]', '[__id_cpsmovim__]' from DEMERITO where find_in_set(coddem, '[__demeritos__]') ;
